hooks.command: if [ -f build.gradle ]; then ./gradlew build -x test 2>&1 | tail -5; fi && if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
